track.title: Track
track.subtitle: Log your sugar intake
track.noEntries: No entries for this day, add some whenever you're ready.
track.enterGrams: Enter grams of sugar (0 if none)
track.enterOunces: Enter oz of sugar (0 if none)
track.howToFindSugarInfo:
Here are some ways to find the sugar content in foods:

1. 📦 Check the Nutrition Label
   Look for "Total Sugars" on the food package nutrition facts.

2. 🔍 Search Online
   Google "[food name] sugar content" for quick results.

3. 🤖 Use AI Assistants
   Ask ChatGPT or similar AI tools: "How much sugar is in [food name]?"

4. 🌐 Visit Official Sources
   Check USDA FoodData Central or manufacturer websites.
track.noEntriesHistory: No entries for this day, add some whenever you're ready.
track.addCustomQuickAddDesc: Add a frequent food for one-tap logging. Long-press to remove later.
track.undoLastEntryConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove the last entry?
track.noEntriesToUndo: There are no entries to undo
track.deleteEntryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this entry?
track.resetTodayConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset today's intake?
track.sugarIntakeIntro: Your body does not need added sugar to function. For the best possible health, the goal is to keep added sugar as close to zero as you realistically can.
track.healthyTargetsWarning: ℹ️ Anything above 25 g means you are already in the high intake zone and moving away from good health.
track.safetyLimits: ℹ️ These are safety limits, not optimal targets.
track.addedSugarItems:
• Candy, chocolate, desserts
• Soda and sweet drinks
• Sweetened coffee and tea
• Sugary sauces and snacks
track.naturalSugarNote: Natural sugars from whole foods like fruit, vegetables, and plain dairy are different. They come with fiber and nutrients and are absorbed more slowly.
track.fruitJuiceNote: 100% fruit juice contains natural sugar (no added sugar) but should still be consumed in moderation, whole fruit with fiber is better.
track.howMuchSugar: How much added sugar will you allow yourself per day?
track.maxDailyGoalDesc: (50 grams). Please enter a lower value.

progress.title: Progress
progress.subtitle: Your journey to quit sugar
progress.streakFreezesDesc: You get 2 freezes per month. Tap a day with no data in the calendar, then choose "Use freeze" so that day doesn't break your streak. Over-goal days still break your streak.
progress.useFreezeHint: Use a streak freeze so this day doesn't break your streak.
progress.noFreezesLeftDesc: You've already used all 2 freezes this month.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your preferences
settings.name: Name
settings.remindersDesc: Gentle reminders to log your sugar intake help you stay consistent
settings.enableNotificationsSettings: Please enable notifications in your device settings
settings.weekStartDayDesc: Choose which day your calendar week starts on
settings.clearAllDataConfirm: This will permanently delete all your data: daily logs, intake history, streaks, achievements, goals, and preferences. This cannot be undone.
settings.failedToClear: Failed to clear data. Please try again.
settings.resetInitialStateDesc: Reset app to initial state (no daily goal set) for testing first-time user flow
settings.resetSuccess: App reset to initial state (no daily goal set)
settings.aboutDesc: SugarLog helps you track and reduce your daily sugar intake. Set goals, track progress, and unlock achievements as you build healthier habits.
settings.resetOnboardingSuccess: Onboarding will be shown on next app restart
settings.emailNotAvailable: Email is not available on this device
settings.faq1Question: How do I track my sugar intake?
settings.faq1Answer: Tap on any food item in the quick-add section or use the custom amount option to log your sugar intake. Each entry is automatically saved and added to your daily total.
settings.faq2Question: How do I set my daily goal?
settings.faq2Answer: Go to Settings and enter your desired daily sugar limit in grams or ounces. The app will track your progress throughout the day and show how much you have remaining.
settings.faq3Question: What happens if I exceed my daily goal?
settings.faq3Answer: If you exceed your daily goal, the app will show how much you went over. Your streak will be broken, but you can continue tracking. Remember, every day is a new opportunity!
settings.faq4Answer: Achievements unlock automatically as you reach milestones like tracking for consecutive days or staying under your goal. Check the Progress screen to see your unlocked achievements.
settings.faq5Question: Can I edit or delete entries?
settings.faq5Answer: Yes! Tap on the history icon to view all your entries for the day. You can edit the amount or delete entries by tapping the edit or delete buttons.
settings.faq6Answer: Streak freezes allow you to skip a day without breaking your streak. You get 2 freezes per month. Use them on days when you forget to track or have no data.
settings.tapToManageSubscription: Opens subscription settings on your device.
settings.upgradeSubscriptionDesc: Log on unlimited days with a subscription.
settings.manageSubscriptionDesc: Manage your subscription in system settings.
settings.quitReasonsDesc: Your reasons are shown on the Track screen. Edit them here.
settings.restorePurchasesSuccess: Premium restored. Your subscription is active.
settings.restorePurchasesNone: No previous purchases found for this account.

quitReasons.title: Why do I want to reduce my sugar intake?
quitReasons.subtitle: Add one or more reasons (up to 3). One of these will be shown on your Track screen each day (rotating if you add more than one) to keep you motivated.
quitReasons.hint: You can edit these later in Settings.
